posts.text:
"The transcript is a rich input, not the final source of editorial truth." Maya Chen on why raw transcripts need human review before they become show notes, quotes, or social clips.

https://creators.example.com/guests/maya-chen

What's the smallest change that would improve your production pipeline the most—a naming convention, a handoff checklist, or separating raw from cleaned transcripts?

https://creators.example.com/checklists/podcast-release
